meaning: n.男爵(英国世袭的最低级的贵族爵位)
examples: I once carried a letter to a baron of that sort.
You've also done security for Sacha Baron Cohen. Is he in character or out?
It was often intended to buy a media baron undue influence over the public.
He has worked to become, among other things, a bicontinental travel baron with an Internet upside.
Eventually Baron Cohen emerges and we take up position on a hotel balcony one sunny afternoon in Cannes.
